'''√g-dh-dh''' ('''kagadhadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cubulate|cubulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cubulate|cubulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √g-dh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kagadhadh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thigadhadh || jigadhadh || shigadhadh || kigadhadh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthugadhadh || jujugadhadh || shushugadhadh || kukugadhadh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thugadhadh || jugadhadh || shugadhadh || kugadhadh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thugadhadh || jugadhadh || shugadhadh || kugadhadh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thegadhadh || jegadhadh || shegadhadh || kegadhadh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothogadhadh || jojogadhadh || shoshogadhadh || kokogadhadh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thogadhadh || jogadhadh || shogadhadh || kogadhadh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thogadhadh || jogadhadh || shogadhadh || kogadhadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh || gadhadh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thægadhadh || jægadhadh || shægadhadh || kægadhadh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathagadhadh || jajagadhadh || shashagadhadh || kakagadhadh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thagadhadh || jagadhadh || shagadhadh || kagadhadh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thagadhadh || jagadhadh || shagadhadh || kagadhadh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shagadhadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshagadhadh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishagadhadh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shagadhadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshagadhadhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishagadhadhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shagadhadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshagadhadhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishagadhadhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shagadhadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshagadhadhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishagadhadhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shagadhadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshagadhadhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishagadhadhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shagadhadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshagadhadhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishagadhadhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shagadhadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshagadhadhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishagadhadhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shagadhadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshagadhadhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishagadhadhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shagadhadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshagadhadhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishagadhadhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shagadhadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshagadhadhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishagadhadhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shagadhadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagadhadhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagadhadhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shagadhadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshagadhadhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagadhadhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shagadhadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshagadhadhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishagadhadhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shagadhadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagadhadhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagadhadhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shagadhadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshagadhadhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagadhadhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shagadhadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshagadhadhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishagadhadhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shagadhadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshagadhadhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishagadhadhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shagadhadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshagadhadhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishagadhadhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shagadhadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshagadhadhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishagadhadhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shagadhadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshagadhadhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishagadhadhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shagadhadhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshagadhadhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishagadhadhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
